resultList.dtldesc: Property Details::::Discover a beautifully furnished 2 BHK apartment for sale in Concorde Auriga, Avalahalli, Bangalore. This ready-to-move residence offers a super built-up area of 1136 sq ft and a carpet area of 773 sq ft, making it an ideal choice for families, professionals, and investors seeking a premium home in a well-developed residential community. Located on the 28th floor of a 28-storey tower, the apartment provides breathtaking views and a serene living environment while offering easy access to the city's key destinations.::::Property Specifications::::This thoughtfully designed furnished apartment features 2 spacious bedrooms, 2 modern bathrooms, and 1 well-ventilated balcony. The home enjoys spectacular views of the main road, swimming pool, landscaped gardens, and a picturesque lake, creating a refreshing and scenic living experience. The intelligently planned layout includes a spacious living cum dining area that seamlessly blends comfort and functionality. A modern modular kitchen with an attached utility area enhances convenience for daily household activities. Elegant vitrified flooring adds a contemporary touch to the interiors, while the Vastu-compliant design ensures a harmonious living environment. The apartment is west-facing and includes dedicated parking space for residents.::::Facilities::::Residents of Concorde Auriga enjoy access to a range of modern amenities designed to support a comfortable and secure lifestyle. The project offers 24-hour water supply, reliable power backup, lift facility, CCTV surveillance, and professional security services. The well-maintained residential complex provides a safe and family-friendly atmosphere, ensuring convenience and peace of mind for all residents. The premium amenities and high-rise living experience make this property an attractive choice for modern urban living.::::Locality::::Avalahalli is one of Bangalore's rapidly developing residential locations, known for its excellent connectivity and growing infrastructure. The property enjoys easy access to major roads, IT corridors, educational institutions, healthcare centers, shopping complexes, and entertainment hubs. Daily necessities such as supermarkets, banks, restaurants, and public transportation facilities are conveniently located nearby. With its strategic location, stunning views, modern amenities, and ready-to-move status, this apartment presents an excellent opportunity for both homebuyers and investors seeking long-term value and a superior lifestyle.

resultList.dtldesc: 5 BHK Villa for Sale in Thalagatapura Main Road Bangalore a stunning eastfacing home nestled within a premium gated community offering a perfect blend of elegance space and vaastu compliance for a harmonious living experience. This exquisite fully furnished 5 BHK villa boasting a generous carpet area of 4492 sqft offers an unparalleled blend of luxury and comfort in a tranquil wellestablished neighborhood. Thoughtfully designed with meticulous attention to detail this spacious home spans three levels Ground plus  2 ensuring a seamless and functional layout for modern living. On the ground floor you will find a cozy bedroom a common bathroom with westernstyle fittings and geyser a spacious living room a dining hall a kitchen and an internal staircase leading to the upper floors. The first floor features two large bedrooms each with attached bathrooms equipped with geysers. One of the bedrooms opens into a balcony that offers a refreshing view of the road and open space. Additionally there is a comfortable living room on this floor. The second floor has two more bedrooms with one bathroom attached. An open terrace on this level provides ample space for outdoor leisure activities or gardening. The villa also boasts a modular kitchen with a chimney and piped gas connection with an additional utility area attached to the kitchen for convenience. The flooring throughout the villa is a combination of vitrified tiles and marble adding a touch of elegance to each room. The villa offers the convenience of open parking along with a reliable 24hour water supply from both borewell and corporation sources. Additionally it is equipped with 100 power backup ensuring uninterrupted comfort and convenience.

The flooring throughout the apartment is finished with high-quality Vitrified tiles. Notably, the property is 100% Vastu compliant, benefits from three-side ventilation, and holds a Freehold ownership with approval from the Bangalore Development Authority (BDA).::::Facilities::As part of a newly constructed, exclusive gated community, the property provides access to a rich suite of modern amenities. Residents can enjoy leisure facilities including a Swimming Pool, a Leisure Deck, and a Fully Equipped Gymnasium. The community also features both Indoor and Outdoor Sports Courts, dedicated Kids Play Areas, and beautifully Landscaped Gardens. Essential services are robust, with two Lifts serving the building, 24 Hours Available water, and a status of No/Rare Powercut for electricity, complemented by 24/7 Security for peace of mind.::::Locality::The penthouse is located in Kambi Pura, part of the well-connected South Bangalore area. The neighbourhood offers exceptional civic and social connectivity, making daily commutes effortless. A major advantage of this location is its proximity to vital infrastructure, including a Metro Station just ten minutes away. Furthermore, the residential appeal is significantly enhanced by the close proximity to a Multi-Speciality Hospital, ensuring convenient access to healthcare services.
